title: How grainy ‘alien autopsy’ vid caused a global storm & stoked Roswell UFO conspiracy theories before truth was exposed
description: ON AN August evening in 1995 there was a worldwide broadcast of an 18 minute, grainy black and white film that caused a sensation. According to the report it had been kept secret by the US military and government for nearly 50 years. Now, millions of viewers could hardly believe their eyes as they watched...

title: UFO whistleblower claims billions in secret spending hidden from Congress
description: Former intelligence officer urged the Defense Intelligence Agency to release documents for congressional review.

title: Long Islanders are hoping to have 'close encounters' with Steven Spielberg's UFO movie 'Disclosure Day'
description: Spielberg's new UFO movie serves as a bookend to his 1977 classic "Close Encounters of the Third Kind."

title: What is Varginha UFO incident? Brazil’s ‘alien case’ back in spotlight amid Pentagon files release
description: A decades-old UFO mystery from Brazil is back in focus as campaigners demand secret files be released, reviving claims of aliens, military cover-ups, and a story that refuses to die.
